title: Analytics - Find My Device Opened
scenario: Log "findMyDevice_opened" event when user opens the "Find My Device" screen and verify Firebase page displays all default elements with updated event counts after a few hours.
steps: Check Firebase Analytics logs for the event 'findMyDevice_opened'.
Wait a few hours for event counts to update.
Navigate to the Firebase Analytics dashboard.
Verify the following default elements are displayed: graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by Country, event count by Gender, events per session, App Version, App build, and App Environment.
expected: The event 'findMyDevice_opened' is logged when the user opens the 'Find My Device' screen. After a few hours, the Firebase page displays all default elements: graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by Country, event count by Gender, events per session, App Version, App build, and App Environment.
